Table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3

Card of table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3

DBMS

Snowflake


Check constraint name of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3

CKT_MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3


Server validation rule of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3

drop table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3 (
MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY TEXT_255_ not null,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
COUNTRY_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_CODE TEXT_255_,
DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
CURRENCY_CODE TEXT_255_,
CURRENCY_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT DECIMAL,
PRODUCT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_BRAND_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
PRODUCT_COLOR_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_COLOR_HEX_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_COMING_SOON_FLAG BOOLEAN,
PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_DEVICE_VERSION TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_EAN TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_EDITION TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_FLAVOUR TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
PRODUCT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
PRODUCT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
PRODUCT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG BOOLEAN,
PRODUCT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG BOOLEAN,
PRODUCT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY INTEGER,
PRODUCT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY INTEGER,
PRODUCT_MODEL TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_NAME TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_NICOTINE_LEVEL TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT DECIMAL,
PRODUCT_OFFLINE_DATE DATETIME,
PRODUCT_ONLINE_DATE DATETIME,
PRODUCT_PLATFORM TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATE DATETIME,
PRODUCT_PRICE_QUANTITY DECIMAL,
PRODUCT_PRODUCT_DETAIL TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_PRODUCT_URL TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_PUFF TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_POINT DECIMAL,
PRODUCT_SEO_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_SEO_TITLE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_SEO_URL TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_STATUS_POINT DECIMAL,
PRODUCT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG BOOLEAN,
PRODUCT_TANK_SIZE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_TYPE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_UNIT_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE TEXT_255_,
PRODUCT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION TEXT_255_,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3 primary key (MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY is
'PK for MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.COUNTRY_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the country of the consumer  (events_country_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_CODE is
'Short code of default language (events_defaultLanguage_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of default language (events_defaultLanguage_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.CURRENCY_CODE is
'Code of the currencies (events_currencies_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.CURRENCY_DESCRIPTION is
'Currencies description (events_currencies_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT is
'Nominal content per sales unit for product (events_products_actualContentUnits )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE is
'Status code for product approval (events_products_approvalStatusCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_BRAND_CODE is
'Brand code for product (events_products_brand_brandCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION is
'Brand description of the product variant (events_products_brand_brandDescriptions_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME is
'gives more accurate information about the brand family of the devices (for example: IQOS, VEEV, IQOS ILUMA, .. ) (events_products_brand_brandFamilyName )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE is
'External brand code for product (events_products_brand_externalBrandCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_COLOR_CODE is
'Color code (events_products_color_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE is
'Unique code for product color group (events_products_color_colorGroupData_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE is
'Hexadecimal code for product color group (events_products_color_colorGroupData_hexCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME is
'Name of the color group in English for product (events_products_color_colorGroupData_name_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the product in english (events_products_color_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_COLOR_HEX_CODE is
'The code HEX value (events_products_color_hexCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_COMING_SOON_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if base product is coming soon (events_products_comingSoon )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE is
'Default category that the product belongs to (events_products_defaultCategory_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION is
'Default category description of the product (events_products_defaultCategory_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE is
'Default category that the product belongs to (external) (events_products_defaultCategory_externalCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the product (events_products_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_DEVICE_VERSION is
'Version of the device, (events_products_deviceVersion )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_EAN is
'EAN code (events_products_ean )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_EDITION is
'English name for product edition (events_products_edition_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_FLAVOUR is
'Flavour of the base product (events_products_flavour_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if product is ready to be shipped (events_products_isProductShippable )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG is
'It identifies if a product is eligible for redemption for product (events_products_isRedemptionEligible )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if base product is ready to be reviewed (events_products_isReviewable )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG is
'It identifies if a product is eligible for Reward for product (events_products_isRewardEligible )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if base product can be sold separately (events_products_isSoldIndividually )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if product is visible only after hard age verification is done (events_products_isVisibleOnlyAfterHAV )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY is
'Maximum number of products that can be purchased in a single order (events_products_maxOrderQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY is
'Minimum number of products that can be purchased in a single order (events_products_minOrderQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_MODEL is
'Model of the base product (events_products_model )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_NAME is
'English name of the base product purchased (events_products_name_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_NICOTINE_LEVEL is
'Nicotine level of the product (events_products_nicotineLevel_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT is
'Nominal content per sales unit for product (events_products_numberContentUnits )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_OFFLINE_DATE is
'Date when product is decommissioned (events_products_offlineDate )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_ONLINE_DATE is
'Date when product is active for sale (events_products_onlineDate )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_PLATFORM is
'The type of the SFP platform that base product belongs to (events_products_platform )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY is
'Product category (events_products_pmiProductCategory )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE is
'This is the product id as it exists in the PMI SAP system. (events_products_pmiProductCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE is
'Local ID of the product (events_products_pmiSellableProductCode )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATE is
'Date until when base product that can be pre-ordered (events_products_preOrderDateUntil )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_PRICE_QUANTITY is
'Number of base products that can be sold (events_products_priceQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_PRODUCT_DETAIL is
'Details about the base product in English (events_products_productDetails_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_PRODUCT_URL is
'Link for the base product info on PMI website (events_products_productUrl )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_PUFF is
'Number of puffs (events_products_puffs_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_POINT is
'Loyalty points that are used to reward the consumer based on her actions. These points can be used as discount while purchasing device or accessories. (events_products_redemptionPoints )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_SEO_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the base product in English that is shown in search engines (events_products_seoDescription_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_SEO_TITLE is
'Title of the base product description in English that is shown in search engines (events_products_seoTitle_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_SEO_URL is
'Product url for SEO requirements (events_products_seoURL_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION is
'Short description of the product in English (events_products_shortDescription_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_STATUS_POINT is
'Status Points earned or deducted for activity (events_products_statusPoints )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if base product is subject for registration (events_products_subjectedToRegistration )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_TANK_SIZE is
'Tank size of the device (events_products_tankSize )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL is
'Technical details of the base product in English (events_products_technicalDetails_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_TYPE is
'Type of base product (apparel product, service fee product, etc.) (events_products_type )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_UNIT_CODE is
'Sales unit for the base product (events_products_unit_code )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION is
'Sales unit description for the product (events_products_unit_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE is
'Tank size of the Veev (events_products_veevTankSize_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.PRODUCT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION is
'Warranty Information (events_products_warrantyInformation_en )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG3.ACTIVE_FLAG is
' It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';
